full_text:
Zhousheng Lie 周生烈
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhousheng Lie (周生烈)was born in Dunhuang commandery. Complied commentaries to the classics and to histories. Zhousheng Lie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
